scripts.build: vite build && cp -R slides dist/slides && cp -R research dist/research && mkdir -p dist/prototype1 && cp "Onboarding Assessment Standalone.html" dist/prototype1/index.html
scripts.build:showcase: vite build && vite build showcase && cp -R slides showcase/dist/slides && cp -R research showcase/dist/research && mkdir -p showcase/dist/prototype0 && cp dist/index.html showcase/dist/prototype0/index.html && cp -R dist/assets/* showcase/dist/assets/ && mkdir -p showcase/dist/prototype1 && cp "Onboarding Assessment Standalone.html" showcase/dist/prototype1/index.html
